slides.title: Bright, white eyes *read as healthy*.
slides.sub: Clear whites signal rest and recovery. Red, tired, dull eyes quietly age your whole face.

slides.title: Sleep clears the whites
slides.body: Short sleep leaves the whites pink and bloodshot. *7–9 hours* lets the tiny vessels settle so the eyes look clear.

slides.title: Dry eyes look dull
slides.body: Low water and dry air leave eyes tired and irritated. *Steady hydration* keeps the surface bright instead of flat.

slides.title: Alcohol reddens them
slides.body: Booze dilates the vessels and dehydrates you — that's the morning redness. *Less alcohol* keeps the whites whiter.

slides.title: Remember to blink
slides.body: Staring at screens cuts your blink rate and dries the eyes. *Look away every 20 minutes* and let them rewet.

slides.title: Hunt the irritation
slides.body: Dust, smoke and rubbing keep eyes red. *Clean air and hands off* lets the irritation calm down.

slides.title: Clear whites, *brighter eyes*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the sleep, water & alcohol your eyes report back on — in one simple daily score.

caption:
Clear, white eyes read as rested — red and dull ones age your whole face. 👁️

Sleep enough, hydrate, ease off the booze, blink at your screen, dodge the irritants. Small stuff, big difference. 🔖

Vibe Health tracks the sleep, water & alcohol behind brighter eyes → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Get Brighter, Whiter Eyes Naturally
